title: Junior Software Engineer (Bank) l 12-month contract
description:
Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Software Engineer to design, develop, and implement high-quality software solutions. The ideal candidate will excel in understanding user needs, analyzing system requirements, and delivering scalable solutions while contributing to continuous improvement and mentoring junior engineers.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop software solutions by studying user needs, system flows, data usage, work processes, and following the full SDLC.
  • Determine operational feasibility through analysis of problems, requirements, and proposed solutions.
  • Document and demonstrate solutions by creating clear documentation, flowcharts, diagrams, layouts, charts, code comments, and clean, maintainable code.
  • Prepare and install software solutions by designing system specifications, standards, and programming components.
  • Improve operations by conducting systems analysis and recommending enhancements to policies, procedures, or workflows.
  • Stay current with development tools, programming techniques, and computing technologies through continuous learning and professional engagement.
  • Provide insights by collecting, analyzing, and summarizing development and service issues.
  • Contribute to engineering and organizational goals by completing required deliverables.
  • Support and develop software engineers through advice, coaching, and educational opportunities.

Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
  • Experience with SDLC methodologies and system analysis.
  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
  • Ability to work collaboratively and mentor junior engineers.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
